features.name: Zig 0.17-dev resolved and locked by Pantry
features.notes: The exact compiler build is locked locally and in CI.

features.name: No Git submodules
features.notes: Sibling repositories are locked by commit and checked out directly in CI.

features.name: Five inspection phases plus logging lifecycle
features.notes: Connector transitions and limits are implemented; rule execution in each phase remains.

features.name: Detection-only interventions
features.notes: Interventions preserve evidence and are marked non-enforcing; action precedence remains.

features.name: Bounded scalar transaction variables with phase availability and origins
features.notes: Connection, request-target, body-length, response, identity, match, and severity scalar foundations are implemented; the remaining stable scalar union and differential fixtures remain.

features.name: SQL injection detection
features.notes: Native adapter is live; complete libinjection differential parity is not yet claimed.

features.name: Versioned C connector ABI
features.notes: Opaque ownership, sized structs, lifecycle, feature discovery, and errors are implemented; callbacks and ABI matrix remain.

features.name: Pantry-managed PostgreSQL 18 and native libpq 18
features.notes: Packages are locked; per-project cluster/port isolation is still required.

features.name: STX development and embedded production assets
features.notes: The workspace and pinned STX source exist; the fingerprinted asset compiler remains.

features.name: HTTP/1.1 reverse proxy
features.notes: Standalone data-plane implementation has not started.

features.name: HTTP/2 reverse proxy through nghttp2
features.notes: The adapter is scheduled after HTTP/1.1 framing and backpressure.
